message:
feat(fcp-core): add release manifest and rollout policy types

Introduce normative types for release management matching the
fcp-conformance JSON schemas.

New types in release.rs:
- ReleaseManifest: Signed connector release descriptor with:
  - Connector identity and semantic version
  - Content digest (blake3-256)
  - Release channel (stable, canary, beta, alpha)
  - Required capabilities and minimum host version
  - Ed25519 signature

- RolloutPolicy: Canary deployment configuration with:
  - Traffic percentage (basis points for precision)
  - Minimum canary duration
  - Success/failure thresholds for promotion/rollback
  - Health check configuration

Constants:
- RELEASE_MANIFEST_FORMAT: "fcp-release-manifest"
- RELEASE_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION: "1.0"

lib.rs updated to export new release module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
